name: Pork Souvlaki

ingredients.item: pork tenderloin, halved lengthwise and cut into 1½-inch cubes
bell peppers, any color, cut into 1-inch squares
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, combine the pork, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper, and oregano. Let sit for 15 minutes.
Assemble the skewers: Alternate pork pieces with red onion and bell pepper. When adding the onion to the skewer, pull apart two layers from each quarter.
Grill the souvlaki for 7 minutes. Turn and cook for 7 to 8 minutes more, or until the pork is done (at least 145°F).
